    Welcome to JJ Music

    Jiyeon Jeon

    Pianist, Composer, Arranger & Educator

    Jiyeon Jeon (JJ) is a pianist, composer, arranger, and educator based in Berlin, Germany. Originally from Seoul, South Korea, she has over 20 years of experience on stage and in the studio — performing in Korea, Japan, China, the USA, and Germany.

    She holds degrees in Jazz Piano and Music Education, and has released more than 12 albums as a composer, arranger, and session pianist. Her debut leader album Journey Together was released in December 2025.

    JJ Group

    JJ Group is a contemporary jazz band based in Berlin, bringing a refined approach to modern jazz that bridges the musical worlds of Germany and Korea. Built on solid, groove-oriented foundations, the band layers intricate melodies and harmonies that unfold with both precision and spontaneity.

    At the heart of their sound is a deep commitment to interplay — the dynamic, organic conversations that emerge between musicians in the moment. JJ Group pursues a musical dialogue that is simultaneously structured and free, carefully crafted yet open to the unexpected. Their music seeks harmonic progressions that feel contemplative and bittersweet, while always carrying an undercurrent of hope.

    With their debut album Journey Together (released December 2025), JJ Group announces their collective voice to the international jazz scene — a sound shaped by diverse backgrounds and shared vision, exploring the space between compositional precision and improvisational freedom. The result is music that is rhythmically compelling, melodically nuanced, and unmistakably their own.

    Upcoming Concerts

    • May 10, 2026 Vocals and Piano Concert — Centre Bagatelle, Frohnau Berlin Germany Tickets
    • Jun 26, 2026 The Friday Singers — Humboldt-Bibliothek, Tegel Berlin Germany More Details Klavier Jiyeon Jeon
    • Aug 04, 2026 JJ Group Album Release Concert — Flatnine Jazz Bar, Seoul.Korea Tickets More Details p. Jiyeon Jeon / t.sax. Myungsup Shin / b. Sang-e Jung / dr. Yeongjin Kim / v. SeungEun Do
    • Aug 06, 2026 JJ Group Album Release Concert — Club Evans, Seoul.Korea Tickets More Details p. Jiyeon Jeon / t.sax. Myungsup Shin / b. Sang-e Jung / dr. Yeongjin Kim / v. SeungEun Do
    • Oct 22, 2026 JJ Group — Alter Schwede Wedding, Berlin.Germany Tickets
    • Dec 20, 2026 JJ Group Album Release Concert — B flat Jazz Club, Berlin.Germany Tickets More Details JJ Group

      Berlin trifft Seoul — JJ Group bringt einen frischen, groovegetriebenen Sound in die moderne Jazzszene. Verwurzelt in tiefem musikalischem Miteinander, verwebt ihre Musik komplexe Melodien mit spontaner Improvisation — eine Verbindung aus Präzision und Freiheit.
      Erwartet harmonische Reisen, die nachdenklich und zugleich hoffnungsvoll stimmen — Jazz, der bewegt.

      🎵 Debütalbum Journey Together von Jiyeon Jeon — Dezember 2025

      Live im B-flat Jazz Club | 20. Dezember Nicht verpassen.

      --- English ---

      JJ Group

      Berlin meets Seoul — JJ Group brings a fresh, groove-driven sound to the modern jazz scene. Rooted in deep musical interplay, their music weaves intricate melodies with spontaneous improvisation, blending precision with freedom. Expect harmonic journeys that feel both contemplative and hopeful — jazz that moves you.

      🎵 Debut album Journey Together by Jiyeon Jeon — out December 2025

      Live at B-flat Jazz Club | December 20th Don't miss it.

      p. Jiyeon Jeon / t.sax. Gianni Gagliardi / b. Roz Macdonald / dr. Heinrich Köbberling
